# Al-Quran Hub

> A free, ad-free platform to read and listen to the Holy Quran online, built as a community service (sadaqah jariyah) for the Muslim Ummah — with Arabic text, translation, audio recitation, and Islamic tools.

Al-Quran Hub provides the complete Quran (all 114 Surahs and 30 Juz) in Arabic with translation and audio recitation, along with daily Islamic utilities like a Tasbih Counter, bookmarking, and Quran search. The platform is fully non-commercial and contains no ads.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://alquranhub.org/): Read and listen to the Holy Quran online for free.
- [All Surahs](https://alquranhub.org/surah): Browse all 114 Surahs of the Quran with translation and audio.
- [All Juz](https://alquranhub.org/juz): Browse the Quran by Juz (Para), 1 through 30.
- [Bookmarks](https://alquranhub.org/bookmarks): Saved verses and reading progress.
- [Search](https://alquranhub.org/search): Search the Quran by keyword or topic.
- [Tasbih Counter](https://alquranhub.org/tasbih): Digital counter for Dhikr and Tasbih.
- [Support / Donate](https://alquranhub.org/support): Support the platform to keep it free and ad-free.

## Blog

- [Blog](https://alquranhub.org/blog): Articles on Surah benefits, virtues, and Quranic guidance.
- [Surah Kahf Benefits](https://alquranhub.org/blog/surah-kahf-benefits): Virtues and benefits of reciting Surah Al-Kahf.
- [Surah Yaseen Benefits](https://alquranhub.org/blog/surah-yaseen-benefits): Virtues and benefits of reciting Surah Yaseen.

## Surahs (1–114)

- [Surah 1: Al Faatiha](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Faatiha): Read and listen to Surah Al Faatiha with translation.
- [Surah 2: Al Baqara](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Baqara): Read and listen to Surah Al Baqara with translation.
- [Surah 3: Aal i Imraan](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Aal-i-Imraan): Read and listen to Surah Aal i Imraan with translation.
- [Surah 4: An Nisaa](https://alquranhub.org/surah/An-Nisaa): Read and listen to Surah An Nisaa with translation.
- [Surah 5: Al Maaida](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Maaida): Read and listen to Surah Al Maaida with translation.
- [Surah 6: Al An'aam](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-An'aam): Read and listen to Surah Al An'aam with translation.
- [Surah 7: Al A'raaf](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-A'raaf): Read and listen to Surah Al A'raaf with translation.
- [Surah 8: Al Anfaal](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Anfaal): Read and listen to Surah Al Anfaal with translation.
- [Surah 9: At Tawba](https://alquranhub.org/surah/At-Tawba): Read and listen to Surah At Tawba with translation.
- [Surah 10: Yunus](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Yunus): Read and listen to Surah Yunus with translation.

- [Surah 12: Yusuf](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Yusuf): Read and listen to Surah Yusuf with translation.

- [Surah 14: Ibrahim](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Ibrahim): Read and listen to Surah Ibrahim with translation.
- [Surah 15: Al Hijr](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Hijr): Read and listen to Surah Al Hijr with translation.
- [Surah 16: An Nahl](https://alquranhub.org/surah/An-Nahl): Read and listen to Surah An Nahl with translation.

- [Surah 95: At Tin](https://alquranhub.org/surah/At-Tin): Read and listen to Surah At Tin with translation.
- [Surah 96: Al Alaq](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Alaq): Read and listen to Surah Al Alaq with translation.
- [Surah 97: Al Qadr](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Qadr): Read and listen to Surah Al Qadr with translation.

- [Surah 101: Al Qaari'a](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Qaari'a): Read and listen to Surah Al Qaari'a with translation.
- [Surah 102: At Takaathur](https://alquranhub.org/surah/At-Takaathur): Read and listen to Surah At Takaathur with translation.
- [Surah 103: Al Asr](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Asr): Read and listen to Surah Al Asr with translation.
- [Surah 104: Al Humaza](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Humaza): Read and listen to Surah Al Humaza with translation.
- [Surah 105: Al Fil](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Fil): Read and listen to Surah Al Fil with translation.
- [Surah 106: Quraish](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Quraish): Read and listen to Surah Quraish with translation.
- [Surah 107: Al Maa'un](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Maa'un): Read and listen to Surah Al Maa'un with translation.
- [Surah 108: Al Kawthar](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Kawthar): Read and listen to Surah Al Kawthar with translation.
- [Surah 109: Al Kaafiroon](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Kaafiroon): Read and listen to Surah Al Kaafiroon with translation.
- [Surah 110: An Nasr](https://alquranhub.org/surah/An-Nasr): Read and listen to Surah An Nasr with translation.
- [Surah 111: Al Masad](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Masad): Read and listen to Surah Al Masad with translation.
- [Surah 112: Al Ikhlaas](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Ikhlaas): Read and listen to Surah Al Ikhlaas with translation.
- [Surah 113: Al Falaq](https://alquranhub.org/surah/Al-Falaq): Read and listen to Surah Al Falaq with translation.

## Juz (1–30)

- [Juz 1](https://alquranhub.org/juz/1): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 1.
- [Juz 2](https://alquranhub.org/juz/2): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 2.
- [Juz 3](https://alquranhub.org/juz/3): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 3.
- [Juz 4](https://alquranhub.org/juz/4): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 4.
- [Juz 5](https://alquranhub.org/juz/5): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 5.
- [Juz 6](https://alquranhub.org/juz/6): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 6.
- [Juz 7](https://alquranhub.org/juz/7): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 7.
- [Juz 8](https://alquranhub.org/juz/8): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 8.
- [Juz 9](https://alquranhub.org/juz/9): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 9.
- [Juz 10](https://alquranhub.org/juz/10): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 10.
- [Juz 11](https://alquranhub.org/juz/11): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 11.
- [Juz 12](https://alquranhub.org/juz/12): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 12.
- [Juz 13](https://alquranhub.org/juz/13): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 13.
- [Juz 14](https://alquranhub.org/juz/14): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 14.
- [Juz 15](https://alquranhub.org/juz/15): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 15.
- [Juz 16](https://alquranhub.org/juz/16): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 16.
- [Juz 17](https://alquranhub.org/juz/17): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 17.
- [Juz 18](https://alquranhub.org/juz/18): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 18.
- [Juz 19](https://alquranhub.org/juz/19): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 19.
- [Juz 20](https://alquranhub.org/juz/20): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 20.
- [Juz 21](https://alquranhub.org/juz/21): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 21.
- [Juz 22](https://alquranhub.org/juz/22): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 22.
- [Juz 23](https://alquranhub.org/juz/23): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 23.
- [Juz 24](https://alquranhub.org/juz/24): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 24.
- [Juz 25](https://alquranhub.org/juz/25): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 25.
- [Juz 26](https://alquranhub.org/juz/26): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 26.
- [Juz 27](https://alquranhub.org/juz/27): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 27.
- [Juz 28](https://alquranhub.org/juz/28): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 28.
- [Juz 29](https://alquranhub.org/juz/29): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 29.
- [Juz 30](https://alquranhub.org/juz/30): Arabic recitation and translation for Juz 30.
